groups.name: Position
groups.description: Shortcuts for setting and adjusting the position of elements.

groups.name: Position
groups.description: Command group for Position. Start with: x, y.

groups.name: Dock In
groups.description: Dock elements inside a container according to directional constraints.

groups.name: Dock to Top
groups.description: Command group for Dock to Top. Start with: dtl, dtr.

groups.name: Dock to Bottom
groups.description: Command group for Dock to Bottom. Start with: dbl, dbr.

groups.name: Dock Out
groups.description: Dock elements outside a container according to directional constraints.

groups.name: Dock out Top
groups.description: Command group for Dock out Top. Start with: DTL, DTR.

groups.name: Dock out Bottom
groups.description: Command group for Dock out Bottom. Start with: DBL, DBR.

groups.name: Size
groups.description: Shortcuts for resizing elements, adjusting width, height, scale, and fitting to parent.

groups.name: Scale
groups.description: Command group for Scale. Start with: sc:w, sc:h.

groups.name: Corner Radius
groups.description: Shortcuts for modifying the corner radius of elements, including individual corners.

groups.name: Corner Radius
groups.description: Command group for Corner Radius. Start with: rt, rb, rl, rr.

groups.name: Top Corner Radius
groups.description: Command group for Top Corner Radius. Start with: rtl, rtr.

groups.name: Bottom Corner Radius
groups.description: Command group for Bottom Corner Radius. Start with: rbl, rbr.

groups.name: Padding
groups.description: Shortcuts for adjusting padding on autolayout objects, including top, bottom, left, right, and combined axes.

groups.name: Padding
groups.description: Command group for Padding. Start with: pl, pr, pt, pb.

groups.name: Strokes
groups.description: Shortcuts for setting stroke width and alignment for elements, including individual edges.

groups.name: Stroke Width
groups.description: These are the shortcuts related to adjusting the stroke width of any object

groups.name: Strokes
groups.description: Command group for Strokes. Start with: swl, swr, swt, swb.

groups.name: Stroke Alignment
groups.description: These are the shortcuts related to adjusting the stroke alignment of any object

groups.name: Selection
groups.description: Shortcuts for working with selections, including quick selection, filtering, and exclusion by type.

groups.name: Quick Select
groups.description: These are the shortcuts related to quick selecting objects

groups.name: Quick Select
groups.description: Command group for Quick Select. Start with: selr, sell, selt, selb.

groups.name: Filter Selection
groups.description: These are the shortcuts related to filtering out elements within selections

groups.name: Exclude Selection
groups.description: These are the shortcuts related to excluding out elements within selections

groups.name: Colour
groups.description: Shortcuts for setting or replacing element colors, including fills.

groups.name: Constraints
groups.description: Shortcuts for applying, centering, scaling, and adjusting horizontal and vertical constraints on elements.

groups.name: Stretch Horizontal Constraints
groups.description: Command group for Stretch Horizontal Constraints. Start with: cxc, cxs, cxl, cxr.

groups.name: Stretch Vertical Constraints
groups.description: Command group for Stretch Vertical Constraints. Start with: cyc, cys, cyt, cyb.

groups.name: Autolayout Behavior
groups.description: Shortcuts for toggling autolayout children behavior and spacing.

groups.name: Text
groups.description: Shortcuts for text spacing controls.

groups.name: Misc
groups.description: Miscellaneous shortcuts that do not fit into other categories.

groups.name: Count
groups.description: These are the shortcuts related to counting elements

groups.name: Count Elements
groups.description: Command group for Count Elements. Start with: countn.

groups.name: Swap Elements
groups.description: Shortcuts for swapping the positions of two selected elements horizontally or vertically.

groups.name: Swap Elements
groups.description: Command group for Swap Elements. Start with: swapx, swapy.
